project.name: Crypto-Trader-Docs
project.description: Documentation tooling — generates OpenAPI specs from running services and bundles the project docs site.

target.echo:

# Library Reference
This module aggregates documentation for child library modules. Select a sub-module below:
## Library
## Admin Library - [Admin-Events](Admin-Library/Admin-Events/api/index.html) - [Admin-Models](Admin-Library/Admin-Models/api/index.html)
## Agent Library - [Agent-Communication](Agent-Library/Agent-Communication/api/index.html) - [Agent-Components](Agent-Library/Agent-Components/api/index.html) - [Agent-Config](Agent-Library/Agent-Config/api/index.html) - [Agent-Infrastructure](Agent-Library/Agent-Infrastructure/api/index.html) - [Agent-Models](Agent-Library/Agent-Models/api/index.html)
## API Library - [Api-Communication](Api-Library/Api-Communication/api/index.html) - [Api-Components](Api-Library/Api-Components/api/index.html) - [Api-Config](Api-Library/Api-Config/api/index.html) - [Api-Events](Api-Library/Api-Events/api/index.html) - [Api-Extensions](Api-Library/Api-Extensions/api/index.html) - [Api-Infrastructure](Api-Library/Api-Infrastructure/api/index.html) - [Api-Models](Api-Library/Api-Models/api/index.html) - [Api-Repositories](Api-Library/Api-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Api-Scripts](Api-Library/Api-Scripts/api/index.html) - [Api-Services](Api-Library/Api-Services/api/index.html)
## Chat Library - [Chat-Communication](Chat-Library/Chat-Communication/api/index.html) - [Chat-Components](Chat-Library/Chat-Components/api/index.html) - [Chat-Config](Chat-Library/Chat-Config/api/index.html) - [Chat-Events](Chat-Library/Chat-Events/api/index.html) - [Chat-Models](Chat-Library/Chat-Models/api/index.html) - [Chat-Repositories](Chat-Library/Chat-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Chat-Services](Chat-Library/Chat-Services/api/index.html)
## Console Library - [Console-Communication](Console-Library/Console-Communication/api/index.html) - [Console-Components](Console-Library/Console-Components/api/index.html) - [Console-Events](Console-Library/Console-Events/api/index.html) - [Console-Models](Console-Library/Console-Models/api/index.html) - [Console-Services](Console-Library/Console-Services/api/index.html)
## Contact Library - [Contact-Events](Contact-Library/Contact-Events/api/index.html) - [Contact-Models](Contact-Library/Contact-Models/api/index.html) - [Contact-Repositories](Contact-Library/Contact-Repositories/api/index.html)
## Data Library - [Data-Communication](Data-Library/Data-Communication/api/index.html) - [Data-Components](Data-Library/Data-Components/api/index.html) - [Data-Models](Data-Library/Data-Models/api/index.html) - [Data-Repositories](Data-Library/Data-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Data-Services](Data-Library/Data-Services/api/index.html)
## Desktop Library - [Desktop-Components](Desktop-Library/Desktop-Components/api/index.html)
## Engine Library - [Engine-Services](Engine-Library/Engine-Services/api/index.html)
## Externals Library - Empty
## Health Library - [Health-Communication](Health-Library/Health-Communication/api/index.html) - [Health-Components](Health-Library/Health-Components/api/index.html) - [Health-Config](Health-Library/Health-Config/api/index.html) - [Health-Models](Health-Library/Health-Models/api/index.html) - [Health-Repositories](Health-Library/Health-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Health-Services](Health-Library/Health-Services/api/index.html)
## Logging Library - [Logging-Communication](Logging-Library/Logging-Communication/api/index.html) - [Logging-Config](Logging-Library/Logging-Config/api/index.html) - [Logging-Events](Logging-Library/Logging-Events/api/index.html) - [Logging-Infrastructure](Logging-Library/Logging-Infrastructure/api/index.html) - [Logging-Models](Logging-Library/Logging-Models/api/index.html) - [Logging-Repositories](Logging-Library/Logging-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Logging-Services](Logging-Library/Logging-Services/api/index.html)
## Security Library - [Security-Config](Security-Library/Security-Config/api/index.html) - [Security-Events](Security-Library/Security-Events/api/index.html) - [Security-Infrastructure](Security-Library/Security-Infrastructure/api/index.html) - [Security-Models](Security-Library/Security-Models/api/index.html) - [Security-Repositories](Security-Library/Security-Repositories/api/index.html) - [Security-Services](Security-Library/Security-Services/api/index.html)
## Universal Library - [Universal-Components](Universal-Library/Universal-Components/api/index.html) - [Universal-Config](Universal-Library/Universal-Config/api/index.html) - [Universal-Extensions](Universal-Library/Universal-Extensions/api/index.html) - [Universal-Models](Universal-Library/Universal-Models/api/index.html)
## Version Library - [Version-Models](Version-Library/Version-Models/api/index.html)
